betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5) is the §6fluid-handling circuit board§f in the AR progression. It is the §6required component§f for any machine that needs to push or pull §6fluids§f in or out of its internal tank — the §6Fueling Station§f (10025), §6Rolling Machine§f (10011), §6Centrifuge§f (10018), §6Chemical Reactor§f (10017), §6Electrolyser§f (10016), and the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f (chain).

§6Production Path (liquidiocircuitboard.json + liquidiocircuitboard_prec.json)§f:
- Vanilla recipe (liquidiocircuitboard.json):
  - Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
  - Pattern (3×3):
    ```
    r v r
    d w d
    d p d
    ```
  - Key: `r`=§6dustRedstone§f, `v`=§6gemQuartz§f, `d`=§6gemLapis§f, `w`=§6slabWood§f, `p`=§6plateIron§f
  - Output: 1x §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5)
- Precision Assembler recipe (liquidiocircuitboard_prec.json) at 200 ticks, 10 RF/t, produces 1 board from §6dustRedstone§f, §6gemLapis§f, §6plateSteel§f

The board is the §6fluid interface§f for nearly every AR machine that has a fluid tank. It is consumed at a rate of 1 per machine built, and §6multiblock machines§f with multiple fluid hatches may need 2-4 boards per machine.

The Liquid IO circuit board is a prerequisite for the §6Fueling Station§f (10025), the §6Chemical Reactor§f (10017), the §6Centrifuge§f (10018), the §6Electrolyser§f (10016), and the §6Atmosphere Terraformer§f (chain). It is also used by the §6AE2 1k ME Fluid Storage Component§f (appliedenergistics2:material:54) recipe.

§eTip§f: The board is the §6second most-demanded ic:5 variant§f in AR after the control circuit. Lapis lazuli is the §6bottleneck ingredient§f — a §6Lapis Farm§f with §6silk touch§f pickaxe is recommended. Build a §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) line for bulk production.
